title: platyspermum aureum
intro: Platyspermum aureum, also known as the golden platyspermum, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Apiaceae. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Platyspermum aureum include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and relieve respiratory issues. The plant is often prepared as an infusion or tincture, and can also be used as a topical application to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
